subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. 1915
subcodes.first_line: He [Haji Mirza Haydar 'Ali] is at an advanced age and with utmost spirituality. He has spent all his energy in the path of God. How blessed is he who devotes his life to the Cause
subcodes.first_line_orig: پیر مردیست در نهایت روحانیت فی الحقیقه جمیع قوایش را در سبیل الهی صرف نموده چقدر خوبست
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @Imam Husayn, @martyrdom of the Bab, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
